chunks.title: Introduction to the Vision
chunks.reason: Sets the scene for Daniel's dream and initial observation.

chunks.title: The Four Beasts from the Sea
chunks.reason: Describes the four beasts rising from the sea and their characteristics.

chunks.title: The Ancient of Days and Son of Man
chunks.reason: Depicts the heavenly court and the arrival of the Son of Man.

chunks.title: Daniel's Distress and Initial Interpretation
chunks.reason: Daniel seeks meaning and receives the general interpretation of the beasts.

chunks.title: Detailed Interpretation of the Fourth Beast
chunks.reason: Daniel asks for specifics on the fourth beast and horn, receiving a detailed explanation.
